title: Use netavark create to fill out network config
body:
Netavark now supports a new command, netavark create, which will take incomplete network configs, validate options, and return a completed config.
Migrate c/common/libnetwork to use the netavark create command

Requires a new netavark, but mostly non-breaking, other than now we enforce true/false for no default route - 0/1 is no longer supported

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: Tests are passing here, but would love to do a vendor into podman before this merges, but that depends on new images which are currently failing. Hold tight..

Ready to review. Tests are passing in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28570 except for one, which will be fixed in https://github.com/containers/netavark/pull/1440. Please merge the netavark PR first to unblock podman vendoring.

@containers/container-libs-maintainers PTAL

Tests are passing in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28570, this should be good to go. 
PTAL @containers/container-libs-maintainers @Luap99, thanks!
Light weight netavark reviewer, but the changes LGTM
